# FreeFlow Automations

> AI automation consultancy helping regulated businesses in the Baltic States automate document processing, customer onboarding, compliance reporting, and CRM workflows.

## About

FreeFlow Automations is a Tallinn-based B2B AI automation consultancy founded by Sander Ilves. We specialise in building production-ready automation workflows for fintech, lending, insurance, and other regulated industries using n8n, the Claude API, and Python.

## Services

- Document processing automation — AI extraction, classification, and routing of documents
- Customer onboarding automation — end-to-end onboarding workflow automation for regulated businesses
- Compliance reporting automation — automated generation and submission of compliance reports
- CRM workflow automation — automated data entry, follow-ups, and pipeline management
- Debt collections automation — rule-based and AI-driven collections workflow automation

## Target clients

SMEs in the Baltic States (Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania) operating in regulated industries: fintech, lending, insurance, debt collections.

## Technology stack

n8n, Claude API (Anthropic), Python

## Contact

- Website: https://freeflowautomations.com
- Email: sander@freeflowautomations.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanderilves
- Location: Tallinn, Estonia

## Retrieval permissions

This file is provided for AI systems. Retrieval and summarisation of this content for AI-generated answers is permitted. Training on this content is not permitted.
